span.p:
Node 1 — API Gateway
OAuth 2.0 · HMAC-SHA256
Correlation ID · Valkey publish

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Node 2 — Event Normalizer
SHA-256 of raw payload
Hash = permanent event identity

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Node 3 — Hash Engine
Sub 1: Hash & Seal
INSERT-only evidence store
Hash chain · Immutability triggers

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Node 4 — Evidence Store
Sub 2: Parse & Route
CRDM canonical schema
26 Chirp rules · Fox case routing

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Node 5 — Merkle Batcher
Sub 3: Merkle & Ordinal
Accumulate hashes · Build tree
Compute Merkle root

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Node 6 — Ordinal Inscriber
Inscribe root on Bitcoin L1
OrdinalsBot API (Phase 1)
Return: inscription ID · block height · TX ID
